svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: var(--ge-adaptive-bg, #ffffff); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="RAG Pipeline" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="1414" dy="905" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1400" pageHeight="1000" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=16;" value="법령 문서" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="220" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=16;" value="Metadata 설계" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="220" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=16;" value="조문 단위 Chunking" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="220" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=16;" value="Keyword Retrieval" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="220" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=16;" value="Evaluation" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="220" y="480" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=16;" value="Failure Case 분석" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="220" y="590" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="100" edge="1" parent="1" source="2" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=2;" target="3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="101" edge="1" parent="1" source="3" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=2;" target="4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="102" edge="1" parent="1" source="4" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=2;" target="5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="103" edge="1" parent="1" source="5" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=2;" target="6"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="104" edge="1" parent="1" source="6" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=2;" target="7"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
